title: ubuntu:18.04 container commit fails with error processing tar file: operation not permitted
body:
<!--
(Edited by @TomSweeneyRedHat to just fix up formatting issues, no text changes.)
If you are reporting a new issue, make sure that we do not have any duplicates
already open. You can ensure this by searching the issue list for this
repository. If there is a duplicate, please close your issue and add a comment
to the existing issue instead.

If you suspect your issue is a bug, please edit your issue description to
include the BUG REPORT INFORMATION shown below. If you fail to provide this
information within 7 days, we cannot debug your issue and will close it. We
will, however, reopen it if you later provide the information.

---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST
-->

**Description**

1. rootless buildah and podman fails to commit ubuntu:18.04 images at applying tar. I can reproduce this only when apt-get install is run in container. Also buildah commit --squash succeeds.

2. ubuntu:16.04 pull fails at applying tar.
3.  Debian, fedora works fine.

**Describe the results you received:**
### 1. fails to commit ubuntu:18.04 images at applying tar

```
buildah bud --format=docker -f ./Dockerfile -t ub .
DEBU Docker v2s2 manifest = {"schemaVersion":2,"mediaType":"application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json","config":{"mediaType":"application/vnd.docker.container.image.v1+json","size":3717,"digest":"sha256:3b5788b6bdee7cdc709873290806de0baad684ecc9bc7740b17e9c1683844180"},"layers":[{"mediaType":"application/vnd.docker.image.rootfs.diff.tar","size":65582080,"digest":"sha256:b7f7d2967507ba709dbd1dd0426a5b0cdbe1ff936c131f8958c8d0f910eea19e"},{"mediaType":"application/vnd.docker.image.rootfs.diff.tar","size":991232,"digest":"sha256:a6ebef4a95c345c844c2bf43ffda8e36dd6e053887dd6e283ad616dcc2376be6"},{"mediaType":"application/vnd.docker.image.rootfs.diff.tar","size":15872,"digest":"sha256:838a37a24627f72df512926fc846dd97c93781cf145690516e23335cc0c27794"},{"mediaType":"application/vnd.docker.image.rootfs.diff.tar","size":3072,"digest":"sha256:28ba7458d04b8551ff45d2e17dc2abb768bf6ed1a46bb262f26a24d21d8d7233"},{"mediaType":"application/vnd.docker.image.rootfs.diff.tar","size":5832704,"digest":"sha256:ce7e5a3f3cfb31126349b969076c496727db00749268346c66c4873ad5a9ea9f"}]}
DEBU Using blob info cache at /b/workspace/containers-43346/storage/cache/blob-info-cache-v1.boltdb
DEBU IsRunningImageAllowed for image containers-storage:
DEBU  Using transport "containers-storage" policy section
DEBU  Requirement 0: allowed
DEBU Overall: allowed
DEBU start reading config
DEBU finished reading config
DEBU Manifest has MIME type application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json, ordered candidate list [application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json, application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v1+prettyjws, application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json, application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v1+json]
DEBU ... will first try using the original manifest unmodified
DEBU Skipping blob sha256:b7f7d2967507ba709dbd1dd0426a5b0cdbe1ff936c131f8958c8d0f910eea19e (already present):
DEBU Skipping blob sha256:a6ebef4a95c345c844c2bf43ffda8e36dd6e053887dd6e283ad616dcc2376be6 (already present):
DEBU Skipping blob sha256:838a37a24627f72df512926fc846dd97c93781cf145690516e23335cc0c27794 (already present):
DEBU Skipping blob sha256:28ba7458d04b8551ff45d2e17dc2abb768bf6ed1a46bb262f26a24d21d8d7233 (already present):
DEBU reading layer "sha256:ce7e5a3f3cfb31126349b969076c496727db00749268346c66c4873ad5a9ea9f"
DEBU No compression detected
DEBU Using original blob without modification
DEBU finished reading layer "sha256:ce7e5a3f3cfb31126349b969076c496727db00749268346c66c4873ad5a9ea9f"
DEBU No compression detected
DEBU Using original blob without modification
**DEBU Applying tar in /b/workspace/containers-43346/storage/overlay/78d26bcbe7cbdb00449b6780728230b5f27d8daf4d34d397fb3bb1c5e852edf8/diff
error committing container for step {Env:[PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin] Command:run Args:[set -eux;       apt-get update       && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends wget       && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*] Flags:[] Attrs:map[] Message:RUN set -eux;       apt-get update       && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends wget       && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* Original:RUN  set -eux;       apt-get update       && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends wget       && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*}: error copying layers and metadata for container "e994ee14149a1e38bde50ffa18fb8c25883009dd16c81710491106a0786ad0fe": Error committing the finished image: error adding layer with blob "sha256:ce7e5a3f3cfb31126349b969076c496727db00749268346c66c4873ad5a9ea9f": Error processing tar file(exit status 1): operation not permitted**
```

Same is reproducible from buildah commandline:
```
buildah unshare
# cat /proc/self/uid_map
         0      43346          1
         1    1000000      65536
# buildah run ubuntu-working-container-1 bash
root@69dd594c64ca:/# apt-get update && apt-get install wget -y --no-install-recommends && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
root@69dd594c64ca:/# exit
exit
subprocess exited with status 130
subprocess exited with status 130
# buildah commit ubuntu-working-container-1 ub1
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob b7f7d2967507 skipped: already exists
Copying blob a6ebef4a95c3 skipped: already exists
Copying blob 838a37a24627 skipped: already exists
Copying blob 28ba7458d04b skipped: already exists
Copying blob ae2019e84a58 done
Copying config 799cd21096 done
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
**error committing container "ubuntu-working-container-1" to "ub1": error copying layers and metadata for container "78eac0ab7e22a20ca7b6ed5c4f5549f29f4d9a6de58ece755fcf280fca6c40b3": Error committing the finished image: error adding layer with blob "sha256:ae2019e84a588eb817fdf58f7dcf6cd592eadb21f03574e2777181ab392e9783": Error processing tar file(exit status 1): operation not permitted**
```
### 2. ubuntu:16.04 pull fails at applying tar.

**Output of `rpm -q buildah` or `apt list buildah`:**

```
built from source
```

**Output of `buildah version`:**

```
buildah --version
buildah version 1.14.8 (image-spec 1.0.1-dev, runtime-spec 1.0.1-dev)
```

**Output of `cat /etc/*release`:**


**Output of `cat /etc/containers/storage.conf`:**
```
# ~/.config/containers/storage.conf
[storage]
driver = "overlay"

# cat ~/.config/containers/containers.conf

netns = "host"
userns = "host"

utsns = "host"
cgroupns = "host"
cgroups = "disabled"

[engine]

events_logger = "file"
```

```
#/etc/containers/storage.conf
[storage]
driver = "vfs"
runroot = "/var/run/containers/storage"
graphroot = "/var/lib/containers/storage"

[storage.options]

[storage.options.vfs]
ignore_chown_errors = "true"
```
**Output of `buildah --log-level=debug info`:**

comments.body: @mrinaldhillon could you share the Dockerfile that you were using?  Or if there's private stuff in there, could you work up a sample Dockerfile we could test with?  I just want to make sure we're using the same commands.

@TomSweeneyRedHat its reproducible even without dockerfile on my setup. I don't get how the issue is only with ubuntu images specifically with apt-get install. debian and fedora works fine.

```
buildah unshare
cat /proc/self/uid_map
         0      43346          1
         1    1000000      65536

c=$(buildah from ubuntu:18.04)

root@buildcontainer:~# buildah run -t $c /bin/bash -c "export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update && apt-get install wget -y --no-install-recommends; rm -r /var/lib/apt/lists/*;"

```

This is working correctly for me on Fedora 32. This could be an issue with fuse-overlayfs?

rpm -q fuse-overlayfs
fuse-overlayfs-0.7.8-1.fc32.x86_64

Especially if this works on rootful containers.

@rhatdan fuse-overlayfs requires >= 4.18 kernel . Whereas our servers are ubuntu xenial. So it is not an option. Moreover I am able to reproduce the issue on ubuntu:18.04 installed from https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/testing/xUbuntu_18.04 repo. buildah and podman both fails to pull ubuntu:16.04 and fails to commit ubuntu:18.04 container after apt-get install as i have shown above. Also vfs is not ideal for performance and storage reasons.

**Error with buildah pull ubuntu:16.04:**
Copying config 005d2078bd done
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
"docker.io/library/ubuntu:16.04": Error committing the finished image: error adding layer with blob "sha256:b9fd7cb1ff8f489cf082781b0e1fe0c13b840e20147e8fc8204b4592da7c2f70": **Error processing tar file(exit status 1): operation not permitted**

**Error with 18.04 - buildah commit after apt-get install:**
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
error committing container "ubuntu-working-container" to "mdhillon/ub18": error copying layers and metadata for container "c1e076d24e264765b40f6cc316ccdef716ae57ec737512033bb6658e85af63d4": Error committing the finished image: error adding layer with blob "sha256:0796d32f9dc71287b21335a25128434cdbc53420765a77f705fe675cfd9cd89a": **Error processing tar file(exit status 1): operation not permitted**

@rhatdan This seems to be related to https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/1709 - rootless overlay whiteouts throw error when stored. https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/master/troubleshooting.md#6-rootless-buildah-bud-fails-when-using-overlayfs :) I am wondering how docker rootless does this?
